provider.name: OpenRouter
provider.description: Unified API for top-tier LLM providers and models.

models.name: Free Models Router
models.description: Routes requests to an available free model. Use as the first OpenRouter fallback when named free models are rate-limited.

models.name: GPT OSS 20B (free)
models.description: Free OpenAI OSS model available through OpenRouter. Useful as a named fallback when the free router is unavailable.

models.name: LFM2.5 1.2B Instruct (free)
models.description: Free lightweight instruct model available through OpenRouter. Best used as a fast availability fallback, not as the highest-quality summarizer.

models.name: Ling 2.6 Flash (free)
models.description: Free fast model available through OpenRouter. Keep as an optional fallback because quality varies on Russian meeting summaries.

models.name: Qwen3 Next 80B A3B Instruct (free)
models.description: Free Qwen model available through OpenRouter. Keep in the catalog, but do not use as the default pipeline model while upstream returns HTTP 429.

models.name: Qwen3 Coder (free)
models.highlights: Free Qwen coding model, often rate-limited
models.description: Free Qwen coding-oriented model available through OpenRouter. Keep in the catalog, but do not use as the default pipeline model while upstream returns HTTP 429.
